context: Tests whether the agent correctly resumes a lifecycle in code_reviewing state by first calling hydrate (not dumping full state), then checking out the stored branch, and using the Phase 5 code-review pattern including the code-findings- prefix for findings YAML files, parallel reviewer fan-out, and --repo-dir because it is in a worktree.

checklist.name: hydrate called first
checklist.description: resume.sh starts with 'swamp model method run webhook-retry-backoff hydrate' (or equivalent issue name) as one of its first commands — before any other state-dependent commands

checklist.name: swamp data get hydrate called
checklist.description: resume.sh includes 'swamp data get webhook-retry-backoff hydrate --json' (or equivalent) to read the compact hydrate summary

checklist.name: git checkout branch command
checklist.description: resume.sh includes a 'git checkout feat/webhook-retry-backoff' command (or uses the branch name from the state) before any code reading or modification commands

checklist.name: --repo-dir flag on swamp commands
checklist.description: The swamp commands in resume.sh include '--repo-dir' pointing to the main repo directory (e.g. /workspace/webhooks-service), because the script runs from a worktree

checklist.name: code-findings- prefix in findings filename
checklist.description: resume.sh references a code-review findings YAML file using the 'code-findings-' prefix (e.g. /tmp/code-findings-issue-webhook-retry-backoff.yaml), NOT 'findings-' (which is Phase 3)

checklist.name: Parallel reviewer fan-out
checklist.description: resume.sh includes reviewer invocations (review-code and review-adversarial) shown as parallel/simultaneous calls, OR a comment stating they are run in parallel

checklist.name: hydrate called again after review round
checklist.description: resume.sh includes a second hydrate call after the record_review calls — to evaluate loop control flow after the review round completes

checklist.name: No plan/triage/approve_plan calls
checklist.description: resume.sh does NOT include 'swamp model method run ... plan', 'triage', or 'approve_plan' — those phases are already complete for this issue

checklist.name: review_code entry not re-called unnecessarily
checklist.description: resume.sh does not call review_code as its entry command if the state is already code_reviewing with active reviews pending — OR correctly explains why re-entering review_code is appropriate

checklist.name: record_review calls included
checklist.description: resume.sh includes 'swamp model method run ... record_review' calls to record findings from the code reviewers
